title: cleanup: remove unused Enter VCR snapshots
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Deletes 31 orphaned JSON snapshots under `enter.pollinations.ai/test/mocks/snapshots`.
- Keeps active Enter test mocks (`github.ts`, `stripe.ts`) unchanged.
- Net diff: 31 files, 3,875 deletions.

Evidence:
- `rg -n "createMockVcr|MockVcr|mockVcr|vcr|test/mocks/snapshots|replay-or-record|TEST_VCR_MODE" enter.pollinations.ai/test enter.pollinations.ai/src enter.pollinations.ai --glob "!**/node_modules/**"` returns no Enter references.
- `find enter.pollinations.ai/test/mocks/snapshots -type f | wc -l` showed 31 tracked snapshot files before deletion.

Checks:
- `npm run typecheck --workspace pollinations-enter`
- `npm run build:frontend --workspace pollinations-enter`
- `npm run test --workspace pollinations-enter -- test/events.test.ts` (3 tests)
- `git diff --check origin/main`

Note: validation used temporary symlinks to the existing local dependency tree; they were removed before commit.

gist.headline: Sweeping up old snapshots
gist.blurb: Just doing a little spring cleaning in the codebase! We swept away some old test files that were gathering digital dust.
gist.summary: Removed 31 orphaned JSON VCR test snapshots from the Enter gateway, deleting nearly 4,000 lines of unused mock data.
gist.impact: This keeps the repository clean and reduces clutter for developers working on the authentication and billing gateway.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old papers/documents (representing the deleted JSON snapshots), with Polly the bee wearing a tiny janitor hat or holding a broom to represent the cleanup chore.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a stack of old dusty documents. Polly the bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny janitor hat and holding a small broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
